mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_MEMBER_PREFERENCE (PREF_ID, MEMBER_ID, TRAVEL_STYLE, BUDGET_RANGE, PREFER_DOMESTIC) VALUES (TRV_PREF_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{travelStyle}, #{budgetRange}, #{preferDomestic})
mapper.select: SELECT PREF_ID AS prefId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, TRAVEL_STYLE AS travelStyle, BUDGET_RANGE AS budgetRange, PREFER_DOMESTIC AS preferDomestic FROM TRV_MEMBER_PREFERENCE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
SELECT TRAVEL_STYLE AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TRV_MEMBER_PREFERENCE GROUP BY TRAVEL_STYLE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT BUDGET_RANGE AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TRV_MEMBER_PREFERENCE GROUP BY BUDGET_RANGE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT PREFER_DOMESTIC AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TRV_MEMBER_PREFERENCE GROUP BY PREFER_DOMESTIC ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT REGION AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TRV_BOARD WHERE REGION IS NOT NULL GROUP BY REGION ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
